choices.text: Instrument rating: fly through clouds + filed IFR clearance + maintains career options. ~50 hrs training + ~30 hrs ground. $8-15k. Opens weather flexibility + career paths.

~3-5 years: 0 hrs → PPL (60) → Instrument (100) → Commercial (150) → Multi+CFI (200) → Build hours as CFI → ATP at 1,500 hrs → Regional airlines → Majors. Most build hours instructing. ~$80-100k total training cost.
